feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Red Web
entry.summary:
Author: himekaida (AshTree95)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,239Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 17

Summary: Your world crumbles the moment you’re freed from General Dreykov’s control. Thrown across dimensions and stripped of everything familiar, you land in Gotham with one goal: survive. You build something fragile in the chaos—a system, a routine, a web that keeps you alive. Then Red Hood tears straight through it. And suddenly, survival isn’t the only thing at stake. You start as a problem. You become something he can’t ignore.

entry.title: Batfamily x Reader Oneshots
entry.summary:
Author: Nightingale_127

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,511Chapters: 53/53Kudos: 203

Summary: Just a bunch of Oneshots of the Batboys! Follow the Batboys adventures with these small short stories. This story can also be found on Wattpad with the same Title & username!(I don't own any character's, DC does unless stated otherwise. Credit to the artists of any images, gifs, etc used.){STARTED: Jan, 2022 - ONGOING} REQUESTS ARE CURRENTLY ON HOLD!

entry.title: You Pretty Boys Are Only Good For One Thing
entry.summary:
Author: Anxe_m

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,077Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Gotham is not a city that believes in mercy.Especially not for people like you.New. Unfamiliar. Easy to break.Your first assignment as an agent was supposed to be simple.Instead, it dropped you here. into a city where the shadows feel alive and the nights stretch a little too long.You’ve heard the stories, read news articles.About Batman.But Gotham isn’t just his city.You’ll learn that soon enough.

entry.title: More to love
entry.summary:
Author: TalesfromtheTrying

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,134Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 65

Summary: This is a drabble/headcannon that I did in 30 minutes because I was procrastinating. Based on a half-cooked headcannon that I have. I make no apologies. After a lifetime of hard and cruel things, Jason Todd has a preference for soft things. Especially in the romance department.

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 114,952Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 689

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: Don’t act surprised when it barges in anyway
entry.summary:
Author: vanillameringuecookie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,991Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 38

Summary: Working under a pseudonym as a burglar was supposed to be the easy way out of your miserable life. entry.title: You can talk to me. - J.Todd/Reader
entry.summary:
Author: liasnotepad

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,605Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: When your best friend, Stephanie, invited you to her family’s gala, your first thought was: “Hell no”. But you went anyway. So, when you heard:– Look who we have here! – Dick comes yelling, making not just you, but people around to look.And it was the most handsome man you have ever seen.You knew you were glad you came.

entry.title: Apartment 3B
entry.summary:
Author: ElaineInABox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,769Chapters: 21/22Kudos: 1,101

Summary: You weren’t looking for love, just somewhere cheap, quiet, and safe enough to get you through the semester. Jason Todd wasn’t looking for company, just a roommate who wouldn’t ask questions about why he came home at two AM bloody and bruised.But in a cramped apartment in Crime Alley, between burnt coffee, leaky ceilings, and the soft hum of the city that never sleeps, the silence between you starts to change. What begins as survival becomes something quieter, steadier—something that almost feels like home.

entry.summary:
Author: frxisier

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 132Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Lady K and the Sick Man inspired. Jason finds himself staying in a strange place after Bruce sends him off on a mission. So strange that he finds a quite eerie woman in there. The landlord had told him to be aware of “supernaturals.” Jason Todd can’t be seeing ghosts now, can he?

entry.title: red string (leads me to the grave)
entry.summary:
Author: ActuallyNonsense

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,740Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 24

Summary: if this is a joke then thе punchline goesthe years fly fast and the days go slowthe string went slack, and with it, the quiet certainty that he was out there. you trace the scar on his jaw in your memory, the mop of dark curls frozen in a photograph — small remnants of a life you’ll never know.

entry.title: Dear, Our Bleeding Hearts
entry.summary:
Author: Goshidori

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,529Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: A story. Isn't that what everyone wants? A story with a hero that has cool powers, someone that can swoop in and save the day. A story where everything turns out alright, where the bad guys get taken down, and the world is saved. That would be a beautiful story, wouldn't it? But that isn't this story. There is no hero, there are no lifelong friends that save the day, because people can't be trusted. No one can save you, but you. To rely on others to pull you from the depths of despair is foolish and naive, that was a lesson learned long ago. But you're already here, aren't you? So I suppose I can tell you this story, and let you learn for yourself just how cruel people can be. So, let's start from the beginning. [Gender-Neutral Reader, this story is for everyone!]

entry.title: HELP! Looking for fanfic
entry.summary:
Author: ladyohara

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 76Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Help! I'm looking for this fanfic I read last year---it's either a Jason or Dick pairing fic. I think the reader/OFC (can't remember if it's a reader insert or OC fic, sorry) is John Constantine's daughter, and she falls asleep a lot. The other YJ characters are there as well. Please help me. I'm losing my mind. I don't know if I made this fic up. Will delete once found. Thank you so much.
